text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
One of my juniors keeps failing her tests... It's
honestly impressive.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But that just makes teaching them all the more
rewarding. I must be thorough... flawless in my
methods.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All right, I've already discerned her weakest
areas, so let's create a few problems for her to
work on. Then we can begin studying tonight!
